name: Defense / Federal (CMMC 2.0 / FedRAMP)
description: CMMC 2.0 Level 2 and FedRAMP Moderate focused report. Maps NetRisk evidence to NIST 800-171 / 800-53 controls, surfaces CUI handling and supply-chain risks.
narrative_persona: ISSO preparing a CMMC Level 2 readiness package
